response.justification: Candidate is an experienced full-stack engineer with strong testing discipline and breadth across web, mobile, and embedded systems, but the role specifically requires 8 years of C++ and 5 years building large-scale distributed infrastructure/compute platforms. The resume shows only a brief C/C++ stint at National Instruments (~6 months) and no demonstrated experience leading cloud compute platforms, distributed systems at scale, or formal technical leadership of cloud/DevOps engineers. Core C++ and infrastructure-scale requirements are not met.
strengths: Broad polyglot engineering background with strong testing/TDD discipline
Founder and long-term maintainer of an open-source platform with Kubernetes deployment
Mentoring and community experience via workshops, talks, and courses
concerns: Falls far short of 8 years C++ experience (only ~6 months at National Instruments)
No demonstrated experience building or leading large-scale cloud compute or distributed systems platforms
No formal technical leadership role mentoring cloud/DevOps engineers

key_factors.factor: Lack of large-scale distributed infra/cloud compute experience
Mentoring and community teaching track record
